title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Workplaces are changing dramatically due to the increase of remote work and gig work.",
    "Legislation is overdue to mitigate negative impacts on workers from data collection, electronic monitoring, and algorithmic management.",
    "AB 1651 would establish a regulatory framework for the use of data-driven technology in the workplace.",
    "Workers would receive meaningful notice when an employer intends to use technology to collect their data, monitor their movements, or make key employment-related decisions.",
    "The collection of worker data would be reasonably restricted to information that meets a legitimate business need and is relevant to a worker's job.",
    "Technologies that pose a higher risk of producing bias-based decisions will undergo an impact assessment with worker input.",
    "Workers will have the ability to seek recourse with the state Labor Commissioner for violations of their rights under AB 1651."
  ]
}
```
